zh.lifeSummary: 當Guillaume IV de Bourgogne-Comté於1095年1月25日出生在法國布格-福朗-可特艾薩o-吉洛易姆a孔時，他的父親Étienne Ier comte de Bourgogne30歲，母親Béatrice de Lorraine36歲。他於1113年與Poncette de Traves結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1156年10月4日在法國布格-福朗-可特艾o-達奧享年61歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Guillaume IV de Bourgogne-Comté于1095年1月25日出生在法国布格-福朗-可特艾薩o-吉洛易姆a孔时，他的父亲Étienne Ier comte de Bourgogne30岁，母亲Béatrice de Lorraine36岁。他于1113年与Poncette de Traves结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1156年10月4日在法国布格-福朗-可特艾o-達奧享年61岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Guillaume
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: William
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

nameMeanings.name: IV
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Guillaume IV de Bourgogne-Comté was born on 25 January 1095, in Mâcon, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, his father, Étienne Ier comte de Bourgogne, was 30 and his mother, Béatrice de Lorraine, was 36. He married Poncette de Traves in 1113. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died on 4 October 1156, in Auxonne, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, at the age of 61.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Guillaume IV de Bourgogne-Comté est né le 25 janvier 1095, à Mâcon, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, son père, Étienne Ier comte de Bourgogne, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Béatrice de Lorraine, avait 36 ans. Il a épousé Poncette de Traves en 1113. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé le 4 octobre 1156, à Auxonne, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, à l’âge de 61 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Guillaume IV de Bourgogne-Comté am 25. Januar 1095 in Mâcon, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Étienne Ier comte de Bourgogne 30 und seine Mutter Béatrice de Lorraine 36. Er hat 1113 Poncette de Traves geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb am 4. Oktober 1156 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Auxonne, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Guillaume IV de Bourgogne-Comté è nato il il 25 gennaio 1095 nel Mâcon, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia, il suo padre, Étienne Ier comte de Bourgogne, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Béatrice de Lorraine, aveva 36 anni. Lui sposato Poncette de Traves nel 1113. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì il 4 ottobre 1156, nel Auxonne, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia, all'età di 61 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Guillaume IV de Bourgogne-Comtéが1095年1月25日にフランスボウルゴグネ-フランチェ-コムトeサoネ-エト-ロイアームaコンで生まれた時，父Étienne Ier comte de Bourgogneは30歳，母Béatrice de Lorraineは36歳であった。1113年にPoncette de Travesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1156年10月4日にフランスボウルゴグネ-フランチェ-コムトeクoテ-ド'オルアウクソンで61歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Guillaume IV de Bourgogne-Comté(이)가 1095년 1월 25일 프랑스 부르고그니-프랭체-코트e 사o니-트-로이르 a콘에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Étienne Ier comte de Bourgogne(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Béatrice de Lorraine(은)는 36세였다. 그는 1113년 Poncette de Traves(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1156년 10월 4일 프랑스 부르고그니-프랭체-코트e co테-드'어 오스니에서 61세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.25 de janeiro de 1095–4 de outubro de 11: 1095 оны Нэгдүгээр сарын 25–1156 оны Аравдугаар сарын 4

pt.25 de janeiro de 1095–4 de outubro de 11: 25 de janeiro de 1095–4 de outubro de 1156
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Guillaume IV de Bourgogne-Comté nasceu em 25 de janeiro de 1095, em Mâcon, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, França, seu pai, Étienne Ier comte de Bourgogne, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Béatrice de Lorraine, tinha 36 anos. Ele casou-se com Poncette de Traves em 1113. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 4 de outubro de 1156, em Auxonne, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, França, com 61 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Guillaume IV de Bourgogne-Comté родился 25 января 1095 г. в местности мaкон, саoне-ет-лоир, бургогне-фрэнче-комтe, Франция, его отцу по имени Étienne Ier comte de Bourgogne было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Béatrice de Lorraine, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени Poncette de Traves в 1113 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер 4 октября 1156 г. в местности ауксонн, кoте-д'ор, бургогне-фрэнче-комтe, Франция в возрасте 61 год.

es.25 de janeiro de 1095–4 de outubro de 11: 25 de enero de 1095–4 de octubre de 1156
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Guillaume IV de Bourgogne-Comté nació el 25 de enero de 1095, en Mâcon, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia, su papá, Étienne Ier comte de Bourgogne, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Béatrice de Lorraine, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Poncette de Traves en 1113. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió el 4 de octubre de 1156, en Auxonne, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia, a la edad de 61 años.
